title: hemitelia decipiens
intro: Hemitelia decipiens, also known as the fragile or delicate hemitelia, is a species of liverwort, a small, non-vascular plant that belongs to the division Marchantiophyta. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Hemitelia decipiens are said to include reduced inflammation, improved wound healing, and enhanced immune function. In herbal preparations, it is often used in teas, infusions, and topical applications to take advantage of its medicinal properties and health benefits.
